## Describe the bug

A clear description of what's going wrong.

## Steps to reproduce

2. Click on '...'
3. See error

What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment

- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 130, Firefox 133]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 22.x]
